schema.title: Response Ping V1 Health Ping Get

403.description: Consent is missing, revoked, invalid, or does not allow a sample category.

409.description: The sync request conflicts with idempotency or ingestion state.

503.description: Raw samples were persisted, but normalization could not be queued.

post.description:
FR-067: correct the observations/hypotheses of a memory summary.

The service layer re-validates item structure and emits a redacted
`memory_corrected` audit event. Ownership is verified before delegating so
a caller cannot correct another user's summary.

MemoryCorrectionRequest.title: MemoryCorrectionRequest
MemoryCorrectionRequest.description:
Request body for `POST /v1/data/memory-summaries/{memory_summary_id}/correct`.

At least one of `observations` or `hypotheses` must be provided. Items are
structurally validated by `MemoryService.correct_summary`, which is the
single source of truth for the corrected-item shape.
